detailed_description: This video vividly illustrates the hair growth transformation experienced by an individual after using minoxidil. It employs a split-screen format, presenting a clear "before" shot of thinning hair followed by an "after" shot showcasing visibly thicker and fuller hair. The short clip highlights the efficacy of minoxidil in addressing hair loss, with a hand demonstratively running through the hair on the "after" side to emphasize the improved density. The comparison effectively communicates the product's potential results.

segments.why_kept: This entire segment is the semantic core of the video, demonstrating the "Before/After" transformation using minoxidil. It directly addresses the main purpose of showing hair growth results via a clear split-screen comparison and text overlays, fulfilling the 'Reveal/Result' hero moment criteria without any setup or dead air.
